channel.title: Global Trend Map — World Trending Topics
channel.description: Real-time global trend analysis across 40+ countries. Hourly updates.

item.title: Why Is "BTS (Bulletproof Boys) ‘SWIM’ Official MV" Trending Globally? March 23, 2026 Analysis
item.description: "BTS (Bulletproof Boys) ‘SWIM’ Official MV" is the #1 global search trend on March 23, 2026, surging across 12 countries with 56M+ searches in United States alone. Here's why the world is searching for it.
